name: @cyanheads/who-gho-mcp-server
description: Query WHO Global Health Observatory data — 3,059 indicators across 194 member states with country, region, year, and sex filters via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

interface.shortDescription: Query WHO Global Health Observatory data — 3,059 indicators across 194 member states with country, region, year, and sex filters.
interface.longDescription: WHO Global Health Observatory MCP server providing access to 3,059 health indicators across 194 WHO member states. Supports filtering by country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3), WHO region, World Bank income group, year range, and sex dimension. Primary workflow: search indicators → get metadata → query data.
